draft.discardAlertBody: Your unsaved changes will be lost.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Optional · what makes this recipe yours?

visibility.label: Visibility
visibility.publicHint: Anyone can find this and save a copy.
visibility.moderationHint: We screen public recipes for community guidelines before they appear in Discover.
visibility.downgradeWarning: Heads up: copies others already saved stay theirs — switching back to private won't recall them.
visibility.guestLockedLink: Save your account to publish recipes →
visibility.noNameLockedLink: Set a display name to publish recipes →

removeAllAlert.title: Remove all pending ingredients?
removeAllAlert.body_one: This clears {{count}} unresolved line that didn't match the catalog.
removeAllAlert.body_other: This clears {{count}} unresolved lines that didn't match the catalog.

pendingValidationAlert.body: Tap each to pick or add an ingredient, or remove them first.

instructions.label: Instructions
instructions.emptyHint: No steps yet. Tap below to add the first one.

guestAiLock.body: URL import and recipe generation are part of saved accounts. You can still type recipes by hand.
guestAiLock.cta: Save your account to unlock AI →

replaceImport.title: Replace your edits?
replaceImport.body: The imported recipe will overwrite everything in the form.

url.prompt: Paste a link. We'll extract the rest.

prompt.prompt: Name a dish and we'll write the recipe, then fill it into the template below.

text.prompt: Paste a recipe. We'll sort out the structure.
text.placeholder: Paste the full recipe — ingredients, steps, the works.

errors.urlPartial: Couldn't pull a complete recipe from this URL. Try a different link, or paste manually.
errors.promptPartial: That didn't generate a complete recipe. Try a more specific craving.
errors.textPartial: Couldn't pull a complete recipe from that text. Try pasting a fuller version.
errors.urlFailed: Couldn't import this URL. Check the link, or paste manually.
errors.promptFailed: Couldn't generate this. Try again or rephrase your craving.
errors.textFailed: Couldn't extract a recipe from that text. Try a fuller paste.
errors.didntCount: This didn't count toward your monthly cap.
